violations.description: REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Wall and ceiling area behind Auto Fry's needs cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside Everest reachin cooler needs cleaning.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory in back dishwashing area is being used for other than hand washing. Needs cleaned out used spatula also located in sink.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Utensil storage drawer in back dishwashing area needs cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling and wall in back dishwashing area needs cleaning; also floor beneath ice machine.
